title: BITF Q4 2023 Earnings: Bitfarms Misses EPS, Beats Revenue
text: Bitfarms delivered mixed results for Q4 2023. Earnings per share was ($0.19), missing analyst estimate of ($0.03) by 16 cents. Revenue was $46.24 million, exceeding expectations of $43.08 million by 7.34%. Summary shows company generated stronger-than-anticipated top-line sales but reported larger losses per share than analysts predicted, indicating operational challenges despite solid revenue growth. Operating performance included earning 1,236 BTC in Q4 2023. Hashrate increased 7% to 6.5 EH/s by December 31, 2023. Operating capacity reached 240 MW. Improved gross mining margin to 52%, up from 38% in Q3 2023. Gross mining profit was $23 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $14 million representing 30% margin. Direct cost per BTC was $16,200. Key strategic developments included securing 35,888 Bitmain T21 miners for installation in H1 2024 and targeting tripling hashrate to 21 EH/s by year-end 2024.
